title: Petco Health & Wellness (WOOF) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Petco Health & Wellness (WOOF) Q1 2023 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates. Q1 2023 Results: Petco Health & Wellness came out with quarterly earnings of $0.06 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.05 per share. Additionally, the company posted revenues of $1.56 billion for the quarter ended April 2023, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 4.93%. Performance Overview: The company achieved better-than-expected results on both top and bottom lines. Earnings Estimate History: Consensus EPS Estimate was $0.05 (-70.6% Y/Y) and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $1.5B (+1.4% Y/Y). Track Record: Over the last 2 years, WOOF has beaten EPS estimates 75% of the time and has beaten revenue estimates 88% of the time. Analyst Implications: The strong beat on both metrics suggested the company had momentum heading into the crucial second half of the year.
